stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells Breaks NCAA Freshman HR Record — 31st Homer Clinches Red River Series for OU

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
RECORD BROKEN.

Kendall Wells just hit her 31st home run — breaking the NCAA freshman HR record.

She passed Lauren Chamberlain, Jocelyn Alo, and Kelly Majam. Now she stands alone.

Six more to reach the all-time mark. #SoonerSoftball #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 31 HRs in 43 games as a freshman.

Lauren Espinoza holds the all-time NCAA single-season record: 37 HRs (Arizona, 1995).

Wells needs six more. She has the rest of the regular season.

Watch this space. #SoonerSoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** Stanford Stuns No. 5 Florida State — Ends Nation's Longest Win Streak at 25 Games

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Stanford just ended Florida State's 25-game winning streak.

No. 24 Stanford swept No. 5 FSU in Palo Alto — walk-off wins in Game 1 and Game 3.

The nation's longest active win streak is officially over. #NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** Alabama Sweeps Auburn 3-0 — Briski Throws Two CG Shutouts in the Same Series

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Alabama didn't just beat Auburn this weekend.

They swept them. 1-0. 4-0. 9-1.

Jocelyn Briski threw two complete-game shutouts in the same series.

First Alabama sweep of Auburn since 2021. The Tide is rolling. #RollTide #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Red River Rivalry Recap — OU Wins Series 2-1, Texas Saves Face With Walk-Off in Game 3

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Red River Rivalry final: Oklahoma wins the series 2-1.

Wells broke the freshman record in Game 2. Texas delivered a walk-off in Game 3 (Katie Stewart, 3-run HR, 8th inning).

But the series is OU's — and the SEC lead just got wider. #SoonerSoftball #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech Stays No. 1, Opens Utah Series With 10-2 Win — Canady Earns AUSL Golden Ticket

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech stayed No. 1 this weekend — beat Utah 10-2 in Game 1.

NiJaree Canady: 16-2. First AUSL Golden Ticket of 2026. Best pitcher in college softball.

Red Raiders are still the measuring stick. #WreckEm #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 10 rankings drop Tuesday at 11 AM ET.

Wells broke the freshman record. FSU's streak is done. Alabama swept Auburn. OU won the Red River.

Who goes to No. 1? Big shakeup incoming. #NCAASoftball #Softball

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
SEC softball standings after the weekend:

Oklahoma: 13-1 (leads)
Alabama: 12-3
Texas: 10-5

The race for WCWS seeding is very much alive. Three games can change everything in the SEC. #NCAASoftball #SECSoftball
